overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic neon-lit city. The scene transitions from a street-level view of towering skyscrapers with digital billboards to an elevated highway with red transit lanes, and finally curves around to reveal an industrial district with smokestacks and complex interchanges.

segments.scene_description: Stationary view at street level in a futuristic cyberpunk city, dominated by a massive central skyscraper with digital billboards. Various vehicles drive past on the asphalt street while green construction barriers line the road center.

segments.scene_description: The camera accelerates onto an elevated highway featuring distinctive red transit lanes. Overhead gantries mark the route while the mega skyscraper recedes to the left. Traffic flows alongside including a purple truck, with futuristic white towers visible on the right skyline.

segments.scene_description: The highway curves right revealing an expansive industrial district with smokestacks, factory buildings, and complex elevated interchanges. Elevated rail tracks run parallel to the road while a yellow truck drives alongside. The urban skyline gives way to industrial infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dense, neon-lit city center to an expansive industrial outskirts. It begins at street level, looking up at a massive central skyscraper adorned with digital billboards as vehicles pass by green construction barriers. As the camera accelerates, the scene shifts onto an elevated highway with distinctive red transit lanes, leaving the mega skyscraper behind to the left while white towers emerge on the right skyline. The highway then curves right, causing the urban skyline to recede as the view opens up to an industrial district filled with smokestacks, factory buildings, and complex elevated interchanges. Finally, the camera glides past parallel rail tracks and a yellow truck, fully immersing the viewer in the sprawling industrial infrastructure.
